description: Skill must invoke render-status.sh --if-stale so the cache regens lazily (not on every call)
Skill must document the cache file path ~/.cache/brain-os/status.md so the reader knows what to Read
Skill must document the dirty marker path so the hook + script share one contract
Skill must describe the -f flag behavior (force regen by omitting --if-stale)
Skill must have a ## Config block pointing at brain-os.config.md so vault_path + gh_task_repo can be resolved
Skill must document the STATUS_CACHE_MAX_AGE safety net — external gh mutations bypass the hook, so a max-age backstop is required
Email Focus must filter by user_category from the dual-perspective taxonomy (ai-brain#100 Phase 2) — replaces the old me-personal/me-business owner-bucket filter
Spec must name the two categories that surface inline (r-user, team-sla-at-risk) so implementers know what to filter on

Output format must document the 🔄 stealth-picked marker + pickup footnote — Ready issues that look picked up in another session without status:in-progress flip, detected via recent vault commit referencing #N OR recent handover/grill/task file matching the issue number.
